systems.name: FundsLink Academy
systems.shortDescription: National education funding platform connecting students with bursaries, NSFAS, SETA funds, scholarships, and emergency support.
systems.longDescription: FundsLink Academy addresses the fragmented landscape of bursary and scholarship applications in South Africa. It centralizes opportunities from NSFAS, SETAs, private bursaries, scholarships, and emergency funding into a single, structured application platform.
systems.problem: 342,000+ students are excluded yearly due to fragmented bursary applications, duplicated processes, and unused funding sources spread across disconnected portals.
systems.solution: A single digital front door for funding, with structured eligibility capture, centralized applications, and an AI-assisted matching layer (future phase) that connects students to the best-fit opportunities.
systems.architecture: Next.js frontend, Next.js API Routes, service layer, Prisma, PostgreSQL, and a dedicated Python AI service (FastAPI) for scholarship matching in later phases. Students and admins use the web surface; HTTP hits API routes with Zod-validated payloads; the service layer owns domain rules; Prisma is the only path to PostgreSQL. A future FastAPI worker will handle embeddings and matching without bypassing contracts.
systems.architectureDiagramCaption: Request path: browser → Next.js API routes → service layer → Prisma → PostgreSQL. Dashed block: planned FastAPI + LangChain matching service integrated through the same API boundary.

systems.name: Maphophe Community System
systems.shortDescription: Digital governance platform for rural villages to coordinate communication, announcements, and service delivery.
systems.longDescription: Maphophe Community System provides a structured digital layer for village-level governance, enabling transparent announcements, tracked service requests, and community voting for decisions that affect residents.
systems.problem: Rural villages often lack digital infrastructure for governance, resulting in fragmented communication, informal service requests, and limited transparency for community decisions.
systems.solution: A governance-focused platform that centralizes announcements, service tickets, and polls so residents can stay informed and participate in local decision-making.
systems.architecture: Next.js frontend, Next.js API Routes, service layer, Prisma, PostgreSQL.

systems.name: MRS (Maluleke Reserve System)
systems.shortDescription: Discipline-driven digital savings bank with goal setting, automated deposits, and interest tracking.
systems.longDescription: MRS is a savings-first digital banking concept focused on building discipline. It emphasizes consistent saving habits, structured goals, and transparent tracking over complex speculative products.
systems.problem: Many people struggle with consistent savings habits and lack accessible microfinance tools that encourage long-term discipline.
systems.solution: A platform that helps users define savings goals, automate contributions, and track progress and interest in a clear, behavior-friendly interface.
systems.architecture: Next.js frontend, Next.js API Routes, service layer, Prisma, PostgreSQL.

systems.name: SyncUp
systems.shortDescription: Creator collaboration platform with structured negotiation and privacy-first messaging.
systems.longDescription: SyncUp gives creators a safe and structured way to find collaborators, negotiate projects, and manage drop-based releases without leaking personal contact details.
systems.problem: Creators struggle to find serious collaborators, and existing platforms lack structured negotiation tools and privacy controls.
systems.solution: A negotiation-first collaboration layer with template-based proposals, a 10-message limit for focused conversations, and privacy-protecting contact workflows.
systems.architecture: Next.js frontend, Next.js API Routes, service layer, Prisma, PostgreSQL.
